query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ai_engine_tasks (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  task_key VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  task_name VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  category VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'general',
  status ENUM('idle','running','paused','failed','completed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'idle',
  priority ENUM('critical','high','medium','low') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'medium',
  interval_minutes INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 60,
  last_run_at BIGINT,
  next_run_at BIGINT,
  last_result JSON,
  last_error TEXT,
  run_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  success_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  failure_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  consecutive_failures INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  is_paused BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  updated_at BIGINT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ai_engine_logs (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  task_key VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  run_id VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('started','success','failed','skipped') NOT NULL,
  input_summary TEXT,
  output_summary TEXT,
  ai_reasoning TEXT,
  actions_taken JSON,
  duration_ms INT,
  error_message TEXT,
  triggered_by ENUM('scheduler','manual','system') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'scheduler',
  triggered_by_user_id INT,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_ai_engine_logs_task_key ON ai_engine_logs(task_key);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_ai_engine_logs_created_at ON ai_engine_logs(created_at);
